are a professional [Namibian football](/wiki/Football_in_Namibia "Football in Namibia") club from [Katutura](/wiki/Katutura "Katutura"), [Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"). They play in the country's highest division, the [Namibia Premier Football League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_Football_League "Namibia Premier Football League").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Namibian football club

For the South African football club with the same name, see [Orlando Pirates](/wiki/Orlando_Pirates "Orlando Pirates").

Football club

**Orlando Pirates Sport Club** are a professional [Namibian football](/wiki/Football_in_Namibia "Football in Namibia") club from [Katutura](/wiki/Katutura "Katutura"), [Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"). They play in the country's highest division, the [Namibia Premier Football League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_Football_League "Namibia Premier Football League").

## Achievements

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Orlando_Pirates_S.C.&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Achievements")]

* **[Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League"): 2**

:   :   1990, 2008

* **[NFA-Cup](/wiki/NFA-Cup "NFA-Cup"): 3**

:   :   2002, 2006, 2009
